Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Version 5: Receive Good Confirmation System & Reporting

- Add Confirm Good feature for warehouse items with Confirm/Waiting/Reject status
- Create confirmation page \(/receive-good/confirm/[batchKey]\) with status buttons
- Implement item locking after confirmation \(no further changes allowed\)
- Add rejection remarks requirement for rejected items
- Display confirm status summary \(confirmed/rejected/waiting counts\)
- Color-code cards based on confirmation status \(green/red/default\)
- Add Time column showing duration between receive and confirm
- Allow admin to delete individual items \(not just entire groups\)
- Add Report page showing PR cards with receiving summary
- Create pr-warehouse.ts router for warehouse-related API endpoints
- Update schema with confirm_status, confirm_remarks, confirmed_at, confirmed_by fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add PR Print, Work Order Modal, Attachment APIs & Sync Scripts

Features:
- Add PR Print page with printable view \(/print/pr/[prNo]\)
- Add PRPrintModal and PRPrintView components for printing
- Add WODetailModal for Work Order details display
- Add attachment upload and serve APIs for receive attachments
- Add TMK logo to public assets

Improvements:
- Update AuthGuard with additional role checks
- Enhance PRDetailModal with more details
- Update Sidebar navigation
- Improve pr-approval and pr-overview routers
- Add prProjectSync service for project synchronization
- Update workflow page
- Update admin users page
- Enhance attachment-sync and auto-sync schedulers
- Add sync scripts for WO data \(pr-wo-link, wo-gi-detail, wo-po-detail, wo-summary\)
- Update global styles

Cleanup:
- Remove deprecated w-series page and related files
- Remove wSeries router and w-series-scheduler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

- Fix relation name in pr-tracking.ts \(user_tracking -> user_tracking_log\)

Features:

EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix PO-PR line matching: use item_code instead of line_num

Previously matched PO lines to PR lines by po_line_num = pr_line_num,
which was incorrect. PO line_num is the line number within the PO
document, not a reference to the PR line.

Now matches by item_code \(with description fallback\), which correctly
links PO items to their source PR items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
